summary: Backend (22/22) and Frontend welcome-screen tests all PASS for Code Guardian. Health, content catalog (8 topics, MIT/Stanford/Berkeley/CMU/Caltech/NSF/ERIC/data.gov), Bearer auth, /auth/me, /usage/me (day_pass caps 6 prompts + 450,000 tokens), quota enforcement (free->429 upgrade msg, day_pass prompt cap, day_pass token cap, monthly 1M cap, expired day_pass auto-downgrade), real Gemini 2.5 Pro quiz generation (10 MCQs each with 4 options + source citation incl. url+institution), quiz submit scoring, /ai/chat (real tokens_charged>0), and Stripe checkout (day_pass $3 + monthly $10 both return live checkout.stripe.com URLs and cs_ session IDs). NO real Stripe purchases attempted. Frontend / route shows welcome screen with testID login-google-btn (52px touch target) and does NOT render tabs when localStorage has no auth_token.

minor.issue: Two non-fatal scrape warnings during pre-seed: MIT 6.036 syllabus URL hits redirect loop, Caltech research-news category URL returns 404. Other sources for those topics still load; quizzes still generated successfully.

issues: Deprecation console warning: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated. Use 'boxShadow'. Non-blocking but should be migrated for RN Web/Expo 54 compatibility.

action_items: (Optional) Migrate `shadow*` StyleSheet props to `boxShadow` in the affected components to silence RN Web deprecation warning.
(Optional) Update two flaky source URLs in /app/backend/sources.py — MIT 6.036 syllabus (redirect loop) and Caltech research-news category (404) — so scrape pre-seed is fully clean.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: all routes prefixed with /api correctly; _id excluded everywhere via projection.
quota.py: pre-call assert_can_call + post-call record_usage pattern is correctly atomic via Mongo $inc upserts; day-pass expiry is auto-enforced inside get_account.
billing webhook is mounted on app (not router) so raw body is preserved before JSON parsing — correct.
Stripe key in .env is rk_live; webhook secret is empty (dev fallback explicitly documented).
seed_data_creation: Test users / accounts / sessions / daily_usage / monthly_usage seeded directly in MongoDB per test via `seed_user` fixture (prefixed TEST_) and cleaned up in fixture teardown. No persistent test data left behind.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend public URL is https://token-limit-enforcer.preview.emergentagent.com/api/*. To test protected endpoints, use the conftest `seed_user` fixture — it inserts a user + account + user_sessions row with Bearer token. EMERGENT_LLM_KEY drives real Gemini 2.5 Pro calls (quiz generation takes ~20s). STRIPE_API_KEY is LIVE; only verify checkout URL shape (checkout.stripe.com / cs_...). Never POST cards. The webhook handler accepts unsigned JSON when STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET is unset (dev fallback).
